title: Tenant Detail
description: Platform-wide single-tenant summary and action-launch surface. Drill target from control-plane.tenants.list. Displays tenant configuration summary, bootstrap history, provisioning status, and available actions. Entry point for bootstrap workflow (same-workspace navigation to control-plane.tenants.bootstrap) and cross-workspace transition to tenant-admin workspace for tenant-scoped administration. Platform-native — no VistA equivalent.

dataSources.description: Tenant records — identity, configuration, lifecycle status, bootstrap history, provisioning state.
